name: Privacy Max
description: Hardened privacy: telemetry off, advertising ID disabled, app permissions locked down, Edge tracking minimised, Cortana disabled.

name: Gaming
description: Turn off background services that compete with games for CPU/disk, disable Game Bar nags, prioritise GPU scheduler, kill the Xbox bloatware.

name: Clean Install
description: Safe, reversible cleanup that anyone running a fresh Windows install would want. Only the safest tweaks — no risky changes.

name: Developer Workstation
description: Show file extensions, enable long paths, disable hibernation, surface developer-friendly Explorer settings, kill Windows Search indexing of dev folders.

name: Media / HTPC
description: For a Windows box wired to a TV: kill notifications, disable lock screen ads, prevent the machine from sleeping, audio quality tweaks.
